## Community Project

**What it does:**
<!-- 1-3 sentences. What problem does it solve? -->

**xysq features used:**

**Checklist:**
- [ ] Created a folder under `community/` with my project name
- [ ] Included a `README.md` with description, setup, and how to run
- [ ] Included a `.env.example` (no real keys committed)
- [ ] Code runs successfully against the xysq SDK

## Bug Fix

**What's broken:**
<!-- What did you expect vs what happened? -->

**How to reproduce:**
<!-- Steps, code snippet, or link to an issue -->

**Fix:**
<!-- What did you change and why? -->

**Checklist:**
- [ ] Referenced the related issue (if one exists)
- [ ] Tested the fix locally

## SDK Improvement

**What this changes:**
<!-- What does it add or change? -->

**Why:**
<!-- Motivation. Link to an issue or discussion if applicable. -->

**Checklist:**
- [ ] Discussed the approach in an issue first
- [ ] Public API changes are backwards-compatible (or approved)
- [ ] Updated docs/README if the public API changed
- [ ] Tested locally
